title: Auto-Deploy Development Branch to Cloudways Server
description: Streamline deployment by configuring the Cloudways development server to automatically pull changes when code is pushed to the development branch. This eliminates intermediate deployment steps.
acceptance_criteria: Pushing to the development branch triggers automatic deployment to the Cloudways dev server
No manual deployment steps required for development
implementation_notes: Configured Cloudways Git deployment to auto-pull from the development branch on push.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed auto-deployment is configured. Pushing to development branch is now automatically pulled by the Cloudways server.
